summary: Rewrote task-executor.md and execute-task.md to use workflow skeleton pattern. Removed hardcoded TDD/Quality Gate steps, added 3-case dispatch (found workflow, no workflow, empty workflow), removed NO_TEST input, renumbered steps from 6 to 5 (0-4).
keyDecisions: Step 2 merged old Steps 2+3 (TDD + Quality Gate) into single 'Execute Workflow' step with 3-case dispatch
NO_TEST input removed entirely from both files
Output format uses Step N/4 numbering throughout

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Step 2 has 3-case dispatch (Case A, B, C)
Case B references default template path
grep NO_TEST/noTest in both files returns zero matches

notes: All 18 acceptance tests pass. No Go code changes in this task — only agent prompt and command markdown files. Coverage N/A for documentation-only task.
